assertions.title: Gas price fetched from RPC when Spandex omits it

steps.expected: Test 'fetches gas price on cache miss' passes, confirming getGasPrice() RPC call is made
steps.observed: Test passed (1ms). Mock client.getGasPrice called once, returned 20 gwei.

steps.expected: Test 'GET /compare shows gas price in response when available' passes with gas_price_gwei from RPC fallback
steps.observed: Test passed. Response body.gas_price_gwei === '1.0000' (from mocked RPC at 1e9 wei = 1 gwei). Spandex mock (makeQuote) does NOT include gas_price_gwei, confirming RPC fallback path.

steps.action: Inspect server.ts lines 566-580 for fallback logic
steps.expected: Server calls getGasPriceWithCache() in parallel with quotes, then uses effectiveGasPriceGwei = spandex.result?.gas_price_gwei ?? gasPriceGwei
steps.observed: Confirmed: line 567 calls getGasPriceWithCache(chainId, getClient(chainId)), line 580 prefers Spandex gas_price_gwei, falls back to RPC value via ?? operator.

evidence.sourceInspection: src/server.ts:567 — getGasPriceWithCache runs in parallel. src/server.ts:580 — effectiveGasPriceGwei = spandex.result?.gas_price_gwei ?? gasPriceGwei. src/gas-price.ts:67 — calls client.getGasPrice() on cache miss.

assertions.title: Gas cost calculated with fallback price

steps.expected: Tests verifying gas_cost_eth computation pass (gas-adjusted comparison tests)
steps.observed: All 21 tests passed including: 'GET /compare factors gas into recommendation when output is WETH', 'GET /compare shows gas-adjusted comparison for non-ETH output with rate fetch', 'GET /compare recommendation flips when gas costs reverse the output advantage'. All verify gas_cost_eth is computed and present in response.

steps.action: Inspect server.ts lines 640-695 for gas cost computation
steps.observed: Confirmed: computeGasAdjustedValuesExactIn (line 643): gasCostEth = (gasUsed * gasPriceWei) / 1e18. enrichQuoteWithGasFields (line 678): quote.gas_cost_eth = formatEthValue(gasCostEth). gasPriceWei derived from effectiveGasPriceGwei at line 695: gasPriceWei = effectiveGasPriceGwei ? Number(effectiveGasPriceGwei) * 1e9 : 0.

steps.expected: body.spandex.gas_cost_eth and body.curve.gas_cost_eth are defined in test

evidence.testOutput: server.quote-compare.test.ts: 21/21 passed. Gas-adjusted comparison tests verify gas_cost_eth computation with fallback price.
evidence.sourceInspection: src/server.ts:643 — gasCostEth = (gasUsed * gasPriceWei) / 1e18. src/server.ts:678 — quote.gas_cost_eth = formatEthValue(gasCostEth). src/server.ts:695 — gasPriceWei = effectiveGasPriceGwei ? Number(effectiveGasPriceGwei) * 1e9 : 0.

steps.expected: Test 'returns cached value on cache hit (same block)' passes, verifying only one getGasPrice RPC call for two requests in the same block
steps.observed: Test passed (0ms). First call: fromCache=false, getGasPrice called once. Second call (same chain 1, same block 1000n): fromCache=true, gasPriceGwei='20.0000'. getGasPrice called only 1 time total.

steps.action: Run: npx vitest run src/__tests__/gas-price.test.ts (concurrent requests test)
steps.expected: Test 'shares cache among concurrent requests' passes
steps.observed: Test passed (1ms). 5 concurrent getGasPriceWithCache calls for same chain/block all returned gasPriceGwei='20.0000'.

steps.expected: Cache keyed by chainId:blockNumber, check before RPC call
steps.observed: Confirmed: getCacheKey (line 38) returns `${chainId}:${blockNumber}`. getGasPriceWithCache (line 77) checks gasPriceCache.get(cacheKey) before calling client.getGasPrice().

evidence.testOutput: gas-price.test.ts: 16/16 passed. 'returns cached value on cache hit (same block)' — getGasPrice called 1 time for 2 requests. 'shares cache among concurrent requests' — 5 concurrent requests served from cache.
evidence.sourceInspection: src/gas-price.ts:38 — getCacheKey returns `${chainId}:${blockNumber}`. src/gas-price.ts:77 — cache lookup before RPC. src/gas-price.ts:93 — gasPriceCache.set() after fetch.

steps.expected: Test 'fetches fresh gas price on new block' passes, showing cache miss when block number advances
steps.observed: Test passed (0ms). First call: block 1000n, gasPriceGwei='20.0000', fromCache=false. Second call: block 1001n, gasPriceGwei='25.0000', fromCache=false. getGasPrice called 2 times (once per block).

steps.expected: Cache key includes block number so new block = different key = cache miss
steps.observed: Confirmed: getCacheKey returns `${chainId}:${blockNumber}`. Block 1000n → key '1:1000', block 1001n → key '1:1001'. Different keys cause cache miss, triggering fresh RPC call.

evidence.testOutput: gas-price.test.ts: 'fetches fresh gas price on new block' — block 1000n→20 gwei, block 1001n→25 gwei, getGasPrice called twice.
evidence.sourceInspection: src/gas-price.ts:38 — cache key includes block number. New block number = new key = automatic invalidation.

steps.expected: Test 'per-chain cache isolation' passes, showing chain 1 and chain 8453 have independent cache entries
steps.observed: Test passed (0ms). Chain 1: gasPriceGwei='20.0000'. Chain 8453 (same block 1000n): gasPriceGwei='5.0000', fromCache=false. getGasPrice called 2 times. Cache stats: size=2 (one entry per chain).

steps.action: Run: npx vitest run src/__tests__/gas-price.test.ts (invalidateChainCache test)
steps.expected: Test 'clears entries for specified chain only' passes
steps.observed: Test passed. After caching chain 1 and 8453, invalidateChainCache(1) removed only chain 1 entry. Stats: size=1, remaining entry chainId=8453.
Confirmed: getCacheKey (line 38) returns `${chainId}:${blockNumber}`. Chain 1 block 1000 → '1:1000'. Chain 8453 block 1000 → '8453:1000'. Different keys, independent entries.

evidence.testOutput: gas-price.test.ts: 'per-chain cache isolation' — chain 1 and 8453 each get their own cache entry at same block number. 'clears entries for specified chain only' — invalidateChainCache removes only the target chain.
evidence.sourceInspection: src/gas-price.ts:38 — getCacheKey: `${chainId}:${blockNumber}`. src/gas-price.ts:131 — invalidateChainCache iterates keys with prefix `${chainId}:`.

steps.expected: Tests 'handles RPC failure gracefully' and 'handles block number fetch failure gracefully' pass
steps.observed: Both tests passed (0ms each). RPC error: gasPriceGwei=null, blockNumber=1000n. Block number error: gasPriceGwei=null, blockNumber=null. No exceptions thrown.

steps.expected: Tests for gas-unavailable fallback pass, confirming quote data intact with null gas
steps.observed: Test 'falls back to raw output when gas unavailable for both routers' passed. Both Spandex (gasUsed=0) and Curve (gas_used=undefined) lack gas. Response: status 200, recommendation='curve', reason contains 'Gas estimates unavailable'. Quote data (output amounts, recommendation) intact.

steps.expected: When effectiveGasPriceGwei is null, gasPriceWei=0 and comparison falls back to raw output
steps.observed: Confirmed: src/server.ts:695 — gasPriceWei = effectiveGasPriceGwei ? Number(effectiveGasPriceGwei) * 1e9 : 0. When null, gas cost is 0. src/server.ts:567 — gasPricePromise has .catch(() => null), so RPC errors produce null, not exceptions. Quote data always returned regardless of gas availability.

evidence.testOutput: gas-price.test.ts: 'handles RPC failure gracefully' — gasPriceGwei=null, no throw. 'handles block number fetch failure gracefully' — gasPriceGwei=null, blockNumber=null, no throw. server.quote-compare.test.ts: 'falls back to raw output when gas unavailable for both routers' — 200 OK with quote data, recommendation_reason contains 'Gas estimates unavailable'.
evidence.sourceInspection: src/gas-price.ts:62-64 — block number catch returns null. src/gas-price.ts:83-85 — getGasPrice catch returns null. src/server.ts:568 — .catch(() => null) on gasPricePromise. src/server.ts:695 — null gasPriceGwei → gasPriceWei=0.

summary: Tested 6 assertions (VAL-GAS-002, VAL-GAS-003, VAL-GAS-010, VAL-GAS-011, VAL-GAS-012, VAL-GAS-020): all 6 passed. Evidence gathered from targeted vitest runs (gas-price.test.ts: 16/16 passed, server.quote-compare.test.ts: 21/21 passed) and source code inspection of gas-price.ts and server.ts. The gas price RPC fallback module correctly fetches from RPC when Spandex omits gas data, computes gas_cost_eth accurately, implements per-block per-chain caching with automatic invalidation on block advance, and degrades gracefully when both sources fail.
